protocols.Paper_title: Delta-24-RGD Induces Cytotoxicity of Glioblastoma Spheroids in Three Dimensional PEG Microwells
protocols.Evidence: cultures infected with Delta-24-RGD were washed with PBS and mixed with trypan blue; cells were counted

protocols.Paper_title: Delta-24-RGD Induces Cytotoxicity of Glioblastoma Spheroids in Three Dimensional PEG Microwells
protocols.Evidence: Cells were stained with ethidium homodimer-1; microwells were rinsed and analyzed using confocal microscopy

protocols.Paper_title: Delta-24-RGD Induces Cytotoxicity of Glioblastoma Spheroids in Three Dimensional PEG Microwells
protocols.Evidence: cultures were resuspended in PBS and subjected to lysis with RIPA buffer; lysate protein concentrations were determined
